summary: Comprehensive e2e testing of B2B Cardamom Export platform completed. All 16 features tested successfully. Backend API tests (21/21 passed) and Frontend UI tests (14/14 passed). Authentication, registration, role-based routing, admin user management, and dashboard flows all working correctly.

minor.issue: React console warning: 'Cannot update component while rendering different component' in Login.js - non-blocking

issues: Home page shows 6 product preview cards (3 visible + 3 likely duplicated via rendering), while Products page correctly shows 3 - minor discrepancy

passed_tests: Login page loads at /login with email and password fields
Admin login works with admin@cardamomspicescentre.com / admin123 and redirects to /admin
Register page loads at /register with all fields (name, email, password, phone, company, country)
Customer registration creates a new user with pending status
Pending customer login redirects to /pending-approval page
Admin dashboard shows user management tab with pending users
Admin can approve a pending user (via approve button)
Customer dashboard loads and shows quotes section (My Quote Requests)
Logout button works and clears session
Route protection: /admin redirects to /login when not authenticated
Route protection: /dashboard redirects to /login when not authenticated
Login page redirects to dashboard if already logged in (admin to /admin)
Navbar shows Login button when not authenticated, Dashboard+Logout when authenticated
Products page loads and shows 3 cardamom products correctly
Home page loads correctly with hero section and product previews
critical_code_review_comments: React warning in Login.js about setState during render - consider moving navigation logic to useEffect
Home page product preview count showing 6 instead of 3 (may be due to test-id counting method)

test_credentials.test_users_created: Multiple test users with pattern test_*@example.com, playwright_*@example.com, approve_test_*@example.com

seed_data_creation: Admin user auto-created on server startup. 3 cardamom products initialized on each server restart.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core B2B auth flows verified. JWT auth working. Admin approval flow working. Customer dashboard with quotes section working. Route protection working for both /admin and /dashboard. Products API returns 3 cardamom varieties. Test users created during testing can be cleaned up via MongoDB. Consider testing: Quote creation flow, Admin quote management, Contact form submission.
